The '''Cyduct E-23 Booster''' was a interdermal injection system manufactured by [[Seselin Medicinal Electronics]]. It facilitated the application of chemical boosters or other medication inconspicuously.

The chemical booster could be worn on the wrist or shoulder strap and used a system of micro-sonic vibration injectors to deliver the desired chemicals directly through the skin without pain or leaving a mark. The system could also be configured for continuous feed or time release application.

A number of serums were available for use with the Cyduct E-23 Booster.
*[[DiMatolin]]
*[[Elisinandrox]]
*[[Greshollpolyforim]]
*[[Haladreshin]]
*[[Requilisant]]
